title: Modern 2-Bedroom Apartment in Wilberforce
description: A clean, modern apartment in a quiet residential area. Close to Hill Station and government offices. Secure compound with parking.

title: Spacious 3-Bedroom House in Murray Town
description: Large family home with a spacious yard. Great for families. Quiet neighborhood near Aberdeen Beach.

title: Affordable 1-Bedroom Flat in Kissy
description: Budget-friendly flat suitable for a single professional or couple. Easy access to Kissy Road transport.

title: Executive 3-Bedroom Apartment in Hill Station
description: High-end apartment with panoramic views. Fully furnished. Perfect for expats and senior professionals.

title: 2-Bedroom Bungalow in Lumley
description: Comfortable bungalow near Lumley Beach. Good for families or professionals who enjoy a relaxed beach-side lifestyle.

title: 1-Bedroom Studio in Congo Cross
description: Compact studio in the heart of the city. Great for young professionals. Walking distance to major shopping areas.
